sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-21 17:44
- Distance: 6 km
- Moving time: 33:13
- Elapsed time: 33:13
- Elevation gain: 131.2 m
- Average heart rate: 162.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 225.9 W
- Average speed: 10.9 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `162.4 bpm`, ranging from `157.4` to `167.4 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.9 spm`, with a working range of `140.0` to `178.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `177.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `167.8 spm` (-9.5 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:31 /km` across `6.020 km` in `33:13` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:23 /km` and second-half pace was `5:39 /km` (+16 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.5 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `157.2 bpm` in the first half and `167.4 bpm` in the second (+10.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `33:13` out of `33:13` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `139.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `40.8 m` and `63.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `61.2 m` in the first half and `78.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
